aside from ultra the 3 other realms are growing; still hate the mechanic that i can´t mix them how i want to. In other games you can do it, but the non realm characters imply doesn´t get the buffs or has another disadvantage, but here you simply can´t mix. That was a wrong decision by the devs imo
It provides us with a bit more leeway and provides units in each realm a better chance to exist without bumping into each other
The realm system is what I like and if anything I'd enjoy having certain characters in certain realms but I understand why they don't
Chaos being the realm that can mix and providing benefits or certain things for mixing them also gives them their own importance in other realms and it becomes part of their identity
It's also fitting for chaos to be able to well fit with anything cause the realm's name is chaos
my problem is that i don´t like the most of the chaos characters, so i  don´t really want to use them and/or invest in them
